aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and relevant content, but lacks depth in optimization and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google Business Profile (GBP) reviews.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords like 'roofing services Towson MD'.
Enhance website content with location-specific information and detailed service descriptions.

gbp_analysis.summary: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) was found, which is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Missing GBP listing affects local search presence.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: Inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web may hinder local search performance.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local chamber of commerce websites.
Ensure NAP consistency across the website, social media, and all online platforms.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema is missing detailed information such as opening hours, geo coordinates, and service area.
Review schema is not implemented to highlight customer testimonials.
FAQ schema is not used to address common customer queries.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of GBP listing severely impacts local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local roofing services in Towson, MD.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP listing with relevant keywords and high-quality images.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing blog posts on roofing tips, local projects, and community involvement.
